decisions.title: Dataplane self-healing uses bounded bootstrap reconciliation
decisions.description: Block 7 keeps config.ingestion_runtime_changed as the primary refresh trigger, but introduces bootstrap.reconcile_interval as a shared fallback for consumer and emulator. The fallback re-reads aggregate bootstrap and only adopts new state when the binding-set signature changes, so missed local events no longer leave the dataplane stale indefinitely while churn remains bounded.
alternatives: Rely exclusively on JetStream runtime-change delivery and require restart or a new event for recovery
Reintroduce broad polling per scope as the primary refresh mechanism

decisions.title: Block 7 closes through the canonical raccoon-cli workflow
decisions.description: The block was only considered complete after focused Go tests, runtime-bindings, make verify, happy-path smoke, and check-deep all passed. This keeps the new fallback path inside the same safety model already used for event-driven refresh and prevents the .context from documenting unproven operational behavior.
alternatives: Stop after unit tests and schema changes without live runtime proof
Treat the fallback as an internal implementation detail and skip documentation updates
